content: The OAuth2 client credentials flow exchanges a client ID and secret for a short-lived access token. This is the standard pattern for service-to-service authentication where no user interaction is required.
Vector similarity search computes the cosine distance between a query embedding and stored document embeddings. Results are ranked by proximity in the embedding space, not by keyword overlap.
Rate limiting prevents API abuse by tracking request counts per client within sliding time windows. When the limit is exceeded, the server returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.
